programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Action adventure with Alec Baldwin. Drawn to danger, a young boy leaves home to follow the footsteps of his storm-chaser dad. But nature's power is more dangerous than he ever imagined... (2023)
Drama starring Montgomery Clift and Paul Douglas. During the Berlin Blockade, two American sergeants smitten with German women struggle to navigate life and love (1950).

A reporter comes from New York to Tombstone to write a story about the town too tough to die.

Steed is under house arrest on suspicion of leaking secrets from the Carmadoc research institute. Can Tara and her new, hapless partner unearth the real traitor and prove Steed's innocence?
Steed and Tara investigate the deaths of secret agents attached to Cypher HQ. Can The Avengers determine whether the case is linked to leaked Top Secret information?
Mistakes of an inexperienced eastern bank clerk who attempts to settle on a ramshackle ranch near the Cannon family threaten to wipe out the cattle industry of the territory.
Western adventure with Don Murray, Guy Stockwell and Abby Dalton. Can legendary trio Wild Bill Hickok, Buffalo Bill Cody and Calamity Jane ride to the rescue as war brews in the Wild West? (1966)

Western with Richard Widmark and Willie Nelson. After a 20 year stretch for robbery, an outlaw is up to his old tricks; and retired Texas ranger Captain Hayes is on his tail once again (1987).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Sheriff Hollister and Editor Claibourne use a horseshoe print to solve the murder of a wealthy rancher.
John Cannon risks breaking a mutual defence agreement with Victoria's father and dissolving his marriage when his ranch hands join a posse searching for marauding bandits in Mexico.
Brett discovers a mysterious group with questionable motives has reopened his family's closed-up country house for unknown reasons.
The Avengers are forced to solve a jigsaw puzzle when its pieces appear in the hands of dead men. Steed and Tara find themselves at the mercy of someone known as the Games Master.
Steed investigates a top-level blackmailer whose victims have either been killed or lost the ability to tell the truth. Can Steed trust anyone involved in the case, including Tara?
Vigilante action with Thomas Jane and John Travolta. After his family is massacred, an FBI agent becomes one-man army The Punisher - and no criminal is safe from his brutal form of justice... (2004)
